title: Industrial Shocks, Demographic Retention and the Income Illusion: Causal Evidence from Andalusian Municipalities, DATASET
author: mihi-ramirez, antonio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the replication materials for  Industrial Shocks, Demographic Retention and the Income Illusion: Causal Evidence from Andalusian Municipalities . It includes the processed municipal panel dataset (INE, SEPE, and Ministry of Finance sources), R estimation code using the did package (Callaway and Sant'Anna, 2021), and output tables. The Personal Income Tax component (IEF Panel of Declarants) is not included; access to that source is governed by the Institute for Fiscal Studies data access protocol ( https://www.ief.es ). The README file documents variable definitions, estimation specifications, and the IEF access procedure. Access to this repository is granted upon reasonable request.
